2606.09809.title: Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting
2606.09809.paper_summary: AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underlying evidence. Recent efforts address isolated components but leave three gaps: they cover only narrow slices of the evaluation lifecycle and do not compose into a single interpretable record; they specify static representations that do not differentiate the questions different stakeholders bring to the same evidence; and they remain proposals on paper, lacking the extraction infrastructure required for adoption at scale. We present \EvalCards{}, an operational reporting layer that composes benchmark metadata, evaluation run data, and model metadata into a unified record. We (1) derive a reporting schema from a structured review of 52 papers and 10 stakeholder interviews, (2) implement four interpretive signals (reproducibility, documentation completeness, provenance and risk, and score comparability), rendered through reader modes calibrated to research and non-research audiences, and (3) deploy a monitoring tool that applies \EvalCards{} across 5,816 models, 635 benchmarks, and 101,843 results, surfacing systematic gaps in current reporting practice.
2606.09809.paper_summary_zh: AI 評估結果在規模上產生，但在排行榜、模型卡、基準論文和公司部落格中報告不一致。其成本是解釋性的：讀者無法可靠地比較不同來源的結果，識別報告中遺漏的內容，或追溯一個總體聲明的基礎證據。最近的努力針對孤立的組件，但留下了三個空白：它們僅涵蓋評估生命週期的狹窄切片，並未組成一個可解釋的統一記錄；它們指定靜態表示，未能區分不同利益相關者對同一證據提出的問題；而且它們仍然是紙上提案，缺乏實現大規模採用所需的提取基礎設施。我們提出了 \EvalCards{}，這是一個操作性報告層，將基準元數據、評估運行數據和模型元數據組成一個統一的記錄。我們 (1) 從 52 篇論文和 10 次利益相關者訪談的結構化回顧中推導出一個報告架構，(2) 實施四個解釋信號（可重現性、文檔完整性、來源和風險，以及分數可比性），通過針對研究和非研究受眾調整的讀者模式呈現，(3) 部署一個監控工具，將 \EvalCards{} 應用於 5,816 個模型、635 個基準和 101,843 個結果，揭示當前報告實踐中的系統性空白。
2606.09809.author: Avijit Ghosh et.al.
2606.09809.authors: Avijit Ghosh, Anka Reuel, Jenny Chim, Wm.
